name: open-multi-agent-kit
description: Provider-neutral multi-agent control plane for coding workflows: route agents, verify evidence, orchestrate MCP-aware DAGs, and control the loop from the omk CLI.

scripts.build:clean: npm run clean:dist && npm run build
scripts.verify: npm run yaml:check && npm run lint && npm run secret:scan && npm run secret:scan:runtime && npm run legacy-identity:check && npm run check && npm run build:clean && npm run test
scripts.contract:check: npm run build:clean && npm run schema:check && node scripts/check-json-stdout.mjs
scripts.release:full: npm run verify && npm run verify:no-kimi && npm run contract:check && npm run schema:check && npm run version:check && npm run proof:check && npm run smoke:execution && npm run native:build && npm run pack:dry && npm run audit:package && npm run smoke:pack
scripts.release:rc: npm run verify && npm run verify:no-kimi && npm run contract:check && npm run schema:check && npm run version:check && npm run proof:check && npm run smoke:execution && npm run native:build && npm run pack:dry && npm run audit:package && npm run smoke:pack
scripts.smoke:no-kimi:chat: OMK_MCP_PREFLIGHT=off OMK_PROJECT_ROOT="$PWD" node dist/cli.js chat --provider auto --mode agent --execution ask --layout plain --mcp-scope none --smoke --json
scripts.smoke:no-kimi:codex: OMK_MCP_PREFLIGHT=off OMK_PROJECT_ROOT="$PWD" node dist/cli.js chat --provider codex --mode agent --execution ask --layout plain --mcp-scope none --smoke --json
scripts.verify:no-kimi: npm run build:clean && npm run smoke:no-kimi:doctor && npm run smoke:no-kimi:chat && npm run smoke:no-kimi:codex && npm run native:no-kimi:turn && npm run no-kimi:default-surface && npm run test:no-kimi:runtime-routing
scripts.test:no-kimi:runtime-routing: node --test --test-timeout=300000 test/provider-router.test.mjs test/runtime-router.test.mjs && node --test --test-timeout=300000 --test-name-pattern='authority provider write-risk routes|configured non-Kimi authority|implicit default authority|unavailable DeepSeek|external direct fallback|Super OMK config|scoreProviders includes|computeProviderRouteScore|runtime fallback' test/provider-routing.test.mjs && node --test test/no-kimi-cli-hud-surface.test.mjs test/v2-regression.test.mjs

author: dmae97
